title: hieracium atrocrinitum
intro: Hieracium atrocrinitum, also known as the dark-stemmed hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat wounds and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Hieracium atrocrinitum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and aid in the healing of cuts and scrapes. Hieracium atrocrinitum can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
